nasb.text: When we had finished the voyage from Tyre, we arrived at Ptolemais, and after greeting the brethren, we stayed with them for a day.

esv.text: When we had finished the voyage from Tyre, we arrived at Ptolemais, and we greeted the brothers and stayed with them for one day.

cnv.text: 我們從推羅繼續航行，到了多利買，問候那裡的弟兄，與他們同住了一天。

ccb.text: 我们从泰尔乘船抵达多利买，上岸探访那里的弟兄姊妹，和他们住了一天。

csbs.text: 我们结束了从提尔开始的航程，到达托勒密，就去问候弟兄们，在他们那里住了一天。
